title: Summer Jam
description: Full event coverage for one of New England's largest summer music festivals. Capturing the energy of live performances, crowd reactions, and behind-the-scenes moments that made this event unforgettable.

title: Boston Fashion Week
description: Editorial coverage of Boston Fashion Week, capturing runway shows, designer collections, and the intersection of style and culture in one of America's most historic fashion scenes.

title: No Hype Fest
description: A celebration of authentic hip-hop culture, featuring performances, art installations, and community engagement. Documented with a documentary-style approach that captured the raw energy of the event.

title: Church Conference
description: Annual conference coverage capturing worship services, keynote sessions, and the powerful moments of community and faith that defined the gathering.

title: Athlete Media Day
description: Professional media day coverage featuring athlete portraits, action shots, and branding photography for team marketing materials and media distribution.
